hero.bio: Handcrafted rune carvings on wood – rooted in the Younger Futhark, the Eddic myths, and authentic Viking Age inscriptions. Every piece is unique and carries its own runic text.

about.title: About the artist
about.paragraph1: {{artistName}} has had a deep passion for history since childhood, with a particular fascination for the Viking Age. Over the years he has visited countless ancient sites and studied runes and runic inscriptions up close – at the actual stones.
about.paragraph2: His work is grounded in the Younger Futhark and authentic Viking Age texts from the Eddas. Every runic band is carefully composed to carry genuine meaning – not decorative pseudo-runes. The medium is wood, and the technique combines pyrography with acrylic paint.

contact.title: Commission a Custom Piece
contact.lead: Every piece is unique – carved and painted by hand with your chosen motif, runic text and colours. Custom commissions start at
contact.success: Your message has been sent. {{artistName}} will be in touch shortly.
